diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Alex. How can I help today?
[Caller] The current event has a currency you earn from daily quests. I did all four dailies but the event currency didn't go up. I'm short 40 event tokens now.
[Agent] Frustrating when you put in the work and the reward doesn't land — let me fix it. UID please?
[Caller] 803990456.
[Agent] Thanks, Aisha. Looking at today's quest completion log. I see all four Daily Commissions completed at 11:03, 11:18, 11:32, and 11:47 — nice efficient run. Now checking the event inventory service... confirmed, the 'Fantastic Compass Tokens' grant for dailies didn't fire on your account. That's 10 tokens per daily, 40 total missing.
[Caller] Yes, exactly 40.
[Agent] This is a known intermittent issue on a small number of accounts when the event started — the grant hook for dailies has an edge case when the character completing the commission was swapped mid-commission. Engineering is aware, but the simpler fix for you is manual credit right now.
[Caller] Oh interesting, I did swap from Kazuha to Nahida halfway through one of them.
[Agent] That matches the pattern perfectly. Crediting 40 Fantastic Compass Tokens to your event inventory via in-game mail — should appear within 2 minutes. While you're in the event, I'd suggest sticking with one character per commission until the patch lands, just to avoid a repeat.
[Caller] Got it. Also are there any retroactive issues from yesterday?
[Agent] Good thinking — let me scan the past 7 days... yesterday's dailies all credited correctly, no other gaps. You're fully caught up after this fix.
[Caller] Perfect.
[Agent] I'll also add 60 Primogems as an apology for the missed grant. And I'll include the engineering ticket number in your confirmation email so if anything else seems off during this event, you can reference it and we'll track it faster.
[Caller] That's really thorough. Thank you Alex.
[Agent] You're very welcome, Aisha. Enjoy the event — the Phase 2 rewards are worth the grind!
